reason: Widget structure conventions (const, MD3 surfaces, no unnecessary Container, prop ordering, build method shape). Required for editing StitchControlsPanel (Divider conditional wrap) and StitchPreviewCanvas / _PreviewSurface (mode-driven SingleChildScrollView + new optional fillAxis prop must follow the existing nullable-optional-at-end pattern).

LayoutBuilder + SingleChildScrollView conventions and WindowSizeClass dispatch. The horizontal-mode scrollDirection switch MUST NOT regress the expanded/large layout in stitch_editor_screen.dart (canvas-on-left + side panel) nor the compact path. Viewport-bound constraint flow through nested LayoutBuilder/Scroll/Constrained/Padding/Center/Surface must remain finite on the cross axis.

Lint + test conventions (const, single quotes, sort_child_properties_last). Required for adding new widget tests covering Divider visibility per mode, horizontal-mode height-fill, horizontal scroll extent, and center alignment when content is narrower than viewport.

Exhaustive enum dispatch for StitchMode. Every new mode-based branch (panel Divider, canvas scrollDirection, _PreviewSurface fillAxis) must explicitly handle both `vertical` and `horizontal` — no implicit fallback paths that would silently miswire a future third mode.
